$comment: Growing registry of APPROVED convergent bounded-open enumeration values, with provenance. Seeded from canonical P01 (SC-0006); grows by governed promotion (tripod promote) as pericope COMPILATION-LOG vocabulary_additions are CONFIRMED. Replaces drift_detector.canonical_p01_enumerations as the live drift baseline for convergent axes. Descriptive/open axes (role/function/_kind _examples, referential_form) are NOT tracked here — they never converge. Vendored + pinned into the compiler; promotions are logged in VOCABULARY_LOG.md and re-pinned.
growth_log: v0.1 seeded from canonical P01 (SC-0006). v0.2 (2026-05-30): promoted P02's convergent vocabulary (41 values across proposition_kind/scene_kind/arc/tone/pace/communicative_function/high_risk_register_kind) via SC-0007 slots — see VOCABULARY_LOG.md. P02 now validates with zero convergent drift. v0.3 (2026-05-30): promoted P03's 27 convergent values via the CONFIRMED-only flow (default gate) — P03 now validates with zero convergent drift. v0.4 (2026-05-30): batch-promoted P04 (31), P05 (33), P06 (40) convergent values via the CONFIRMED-only flow — the full Ruth pilot corpus (P01–P06) now validates with zero convergent drift.
